code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let target = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0 - 1
  while i < n
    let b = byte_of(body, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      if start >= 0
        let token = string.substring(body, start, i)
        if token == target
          count = count + 1
        end
        start = 0 - 1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let token = string.substring(body, start, n)
    if token == target
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
